The heavy storm forced the sailors to [WORD] their sinking ship in the middle of the ocean,
leaving behind all their personal belongings and precious cargo to save their lives,
as they desperately waited for a rescue helicopter to arrive before the night fell completely.

The meeting came to an [WORD] end when the fire alarm suddenly started ringing loudly,
causing a huge panic among the employees who were discussing the new project details,
and everyone quickly headed toward the emergency exits without even taking their jackets.

During the long [WORD] of the manager, the office became a very quiet and disorganized place,
because nobody knew exactly how to handle the complex customer complaints or technical issues,
which eventually led to a significant delay in the completion of the monthly financial reports.

The scientists explained that regular exercise and a healthy diet form the [WORD] of a long life,
providing the body with the necessary energy and strength to fight against various illnesses,
while also improving mental health and reducing the overall stress levels of modern daily routines.

The young [WORD] spent many hours preparing a professional resume and practicing for the interview,
hoping to impress the hiring committee with his unique skills and previous work experiences,
since this job at the international company was exactly what he had dreamed of for years.

The old bridge began to [GAP1] after the heavy flood waters weakened its ancient stone pillars,
making it impossible for villagers to cross the river and reach the nearby town for supplies,
until the local government decided to build a modern and much stronger structure in its place.

The new law about social media usage created a huge [GAP1] among young people and politicians,

unit-1.sentence:
The rapid [WORD] of technology has changed the way we communicate with people worldwide,
allowing us to share information and high-quality videos in just a few seconds through the internet,
which was something completely unimaginable for most people only a few decades ago.

The museum visitors were amazed by the ancient golden [WORD] found in the deep ocean,
as it provided crucial clues about the daily lives and artistic skills of a forgotten civilization,
proving that people living thousands of years ago were much more sophisticated than we thought.

Many modern companies have decided to [WORD] more flexible working hours for their staff,
believing that giving employees more freedom will increase their overall productivity and happiness,
